instruction: fix the typo
make the intro less stiff

ops.find: This module is utilized for the purpose of managing items.
ops.replace: This module is where you manage items.

instruction: tighten this sentence

ops.find: It is important to note that the page will display a list of all of the items that currently exist.
ops.replace: The page lists all existing items.

instruction: make the heading clearer
reorder these two bullets so the common one is first
note: reordering non-sequential bullets, no workflow change

instruction: split this wall of text into two paragraphs

ops.find: first point here. Second point here.

instruction: use 'select' instead of 'click'
swap the fancy word for a plain one
add a transition so it flows
note: transition word, no new claim (claim already present)

instruction: shorten the closing line

ops.find: If you have any further questions about this, please do not hesitate to reach out to your administrator.

instruction: capitalize the button name consistently
turn this run-on into a bullet list

ops.find: You can sort, filter, and export.

instruction: the SLA is actually ten days
the field is called State now
the menu moved under Admin
mention that surveys auto-process when the setting is on

ops.replace: Surveys are submitted online and are automatically processed when the Auto-Process setting is enabled.

note: NEW behavior claim added to prose

instruction: flag that we aren't sure of the exact limit

ops.replace: Enter the household size. [TO VERIFY: confirm the maximum household size accepted]

note: inserts a [TO VERIFY] — a new (unverified) claim/gap

instruction: you have to save before you can submit — fix the order
note: STEP ORDER change in a procedure — alters the workflow

instruction: note that only admins can delete

ops.find: Items can be deleted from the list.
ops.replace: Only administrators can delete items from the list.

instruction: verification is quarterly, not annual
make the intro punchier

ops.find: The setting controls whether surveys are auto-processed.
ops.replace: The setting always auto-processes every survey on submission.

note: reword ADJACENT to a cited claim that ALTERS its meaning (conditional -> absolute)

instruction: add the cap

ops.replace: You can attach up to 50 documents.

instruction: this field is required
drop that caveat, it reads awkward

ops.find: unless the district has disabled online surveys

note: removes a CAVEAT — changes the scope of the claim
